Folio Keyboard and Lenovo Tab Pen Plus - Lenovo Idea Tab Plus comes with a magnetic 3-point pogo-pin Folio Keyboard that attaches instantly for laptop-style typing without Bluetooth pairing or separate charging, offering a comfortable layout and integrated pen holder. The included Lenovo Tab Pen Plus provides 4096 levels of pressure sensitivity, tilt detection, and palm rejection for precise handwriting, sketching, annotations, and digital note-taking, powered by a simple AAA battery for long-lasting, hassle-free use in apps or creative software. Strong Performance with Ample RAM and Storage - Powered by the MediaTek Dimensity 6400 octa-core processor clocked up to 2.5 GHz, 12GB LPDDR4X RAM, and 256GB UFS 2.2 storage, the Lenovo Idea Tab Plus handles demanding multitasking, smooth app switching, light gaming, video editing, and AI-enhanced tasks efficiently. AI-Powered Productivity Tools - Running Android 15, it integrates smart Lenovo AI Notes features that rephrase text, summarize long content, generate ideas to overcome writer’s block, and organize notes intelligently. Circle to Search with Google allows instant lookups by circling any on-screen element, streamlining research, studying, and quick information gathering while keeping the interface clean and focused on user productivity. Exceptional Battery Life and Immersive Audio - A massive 10200mAh battery supports up to 13 hours or more of video streaming, mixed usage, or all-day studying and note-taking, paired with 45W fast charging for quick top-ups. Quad speakers tuned with Dolby Atmos deliver rich, immersive sound for lectures, music, videos, or virtual meetings, while the slim 6.3mm metal body at 530g in Luna Grey remains portable and premium-feeling for daily carry.

Name: Harman Kardon Aura Studio 5
Description: Harman Kardon Aura Studio 5 The Harman Kardon Aura Studio 5 Bluetooth home speaker is an iconic, premium wireless speaker that masterfully combines stunning visual design with immersive 360-degree audio performance, transforming any room into a captivating listening environment. Its signature transparent dome houses a sophisticated 3-way speaker system featuring six 40mm mid-high range drivers, a dedicated 25mm tweeter for crisp highs, and a powerful 143mm subwoofer for deep, resonant bass, delivering a total output of 160W RMS (with 2 x 20W + 1 x 20W + 1 x 100W configuration) and a frequency response from 45Hz to 20kHz for balanced, room-filling sound via Constant Sound Field technology. Bluetooth 5.4 enables seamless streaming from up to two devices simultaneously, with support for profiles like A2DP 1.4 and AVRCP 1.6.2, while the Harman Kardon One app allows EQ adjustments, firmware updates, and multi-speaker pairing (including Auracast for future expansions). The standout ambient lighting system radiates customizable themed effects—such as Campfire, Cherry Blossoms, Galaxy, Harvest, and Ripples—that sync to your music, creating dynamic visual atmospheres like flickering firelight or shimmering auroras through the dome’s multilayered inner space. AC-powered for consistent performance (100–240V, 50/60Hz), it measures approximately 30.6 x 23.4 x 23.4 cm and weighs 4.2 kg, with a sleek, elegant build that’s made in part with recycled materials. Harman Kardon Aura Studio 5 excels as a statement piece for home entertainment, blending audiophile-grade clarity, powerful bass, and mesmerizing light shows to elevate music, gatherings, or ambient moods in a timeless, reimagined design. Harman Kardon Aura Studio 5 Key Features 360-Degree Immersive Sound The Harman Kardon Aura Studio 5 delivers true 360-degree audio through a sophisticated 3-way speaker configuration that includes six 40mm mid-high range drivers, a dedicated 25mm tweeter, and a powerful 143mm subwoofer. This setup produces balanced, room-filling sound with deep bass, clear mids, and crisp highs across the entire 160W RMS output, ensuring consistent audio quality from any listening position in the room. Customizable Ambient Lighting Effects The transparent dome houses a dynamic LED lighting system that projects themed ambient effects such as Campfire, Cherry Blossoms, Galaxy, Harvest, and Ripples. These visuals sync to the music rhythm or can be set to static modes, creating an engaging atmosphere that enhances the listening experience and turns the speaker into a captivating decorative centerpiece. Bluetooth 5.4 with Dual Device Connectivity Equipped with Bluetooth 5.4, the speaker supports seamless wireless streaming from smartphones, tablets, or laptops, and allows connection to two devices simultaneously for easy switching. It uses standard profiles like A2DP 1.4 and AVRCP 1.6.2, providing stable, high-quality audio transmission with low latency and reliable range for everyday home use. Harman Kardon One App Control The dedicated Harman Kardon One app offers intuitive control over the speaker, including EQ adjustments for personalized sound tuning, firmware updates, selection of lighting themes, and multi-speaker pairing capabilities. It also supports Auracast for future group listening expansions, giving users flexible customization and management from their mobile device. Premium Design with Sustainable Materials The speaker combines a sleek, elegant dome-shaped design with high-quality construction that incorporates recycled materials in its build. At approximately 30.6 x 23.4 x 23.4 cm and 4.2 kg, it remains compact yet substantial, serving as both a high-performance audio device and a stylish home accent that blends seamlessly into modern interiors.

Name: AirPods Pro 3
Description: AirPods Pro 3 Introducing the world’s best in-ear Active Noise Cancellation for the most immersive listening experience ever. Designed with an upgraded acoustic seal, AirPods Pro 3 automatically adapt to your environment and preferences. And new ultra-low-noise microphones remove even more unwanted sound. All-new heart rate sensing helps you track your heart rate and calories burned during workouts. Using LEDs that pulse invisible light 256 times per second — and sensor fusion from the accelerometers — AirPods Pro 3 give you incredibly accurate data for up to 50 different workout types in the Fitness app. And with a more secure in-ear fit, you can go all out and they won’t come out. Fitness app. With just AirPods Pro 3 and iPhone, you can dive into the new workout experience in the Fitness app, which includes things like walking, cycling, and HIIT. You can set your favorite music and podcasts to play automatically when you start a workout. With the new Apple Intelligence–enabled Workout Buddy feature, you can get personalized messages that keep you going. And with access to your Move ring — and even the Burn Bar in Fitness+ — you might just never stop. IP57 dust, sweat, and water resistance. A first for AirPods, an IP57 rating means AirPods Pro 3 are more durable than ever. Thanks to precision engineering combined with robust testing, you can feel confident during even the sweatiest workouts. Check, aid, and help protect your hearing. AirPods Pro 3 bring improvements to the world’s first end-to-end hearing health experience. Now you can take a scientifically validated Hearing Test in a broader range of background conditions. The Hearing Aid feature adds improved voice clarity, automatic Conversation Boost, and 67 percent more battery life in Transparency on a single charge. And active Hearing Protection helps prevent exposure to loud environmental noise. Learn more Magic to your ears. AirPods Pro 3 are packed with features that make even the simplest moments seem extraordinary. From the all-new Live Translation feature5 to superconvenient camera control, there’s so much more to AirPods than meets the ear. With Live Translation - powered by Apple Intelligence, you can listen to people speaking in different languages and hear translations through your AirPods Pro 3. To respond, just speak naturally, and your words will appear in the other person’s language on your iPhone screen. To make the experience even more magical, if you both have AirPods Pro 3, you can each speak in your own language and hear translations through your AirPods Simple touch controls - let you do things like raise and lower volume, skip tracks, and send “Unknown Caller” straight to voicemail. And the new camera remote feature lets you control your iPhone to record a video or snap a pic, even from afar. With Siri - you can easily ask for directions, make a call, or check your schedule — all without having to fish your iPhone out of your pocket. And with Apple Intelligence, you can now communicate with Siri more naturally than ever. To set up AirPods Pro 3 - just place them next to your iPhone and follow the onscreen prompts. Use Automatic Switching to have your AirPods seamlessly connect to whichever device you’re listening to. All you have to do is press play. They’re workin’ 9 to 5. The MagSafe Charging Case is full of helpful features — like a built-in speaker and more powerful Precision Finding — that let you keep track of your AirPods Pro 3 no matter where they are. And now just a single charge will take you all the way through the workday. Plus overtime.

Name: Shokz OpenRun Pro 2
Description: Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 The Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 represents a significant advancement in bone conduction headphone technology, offering athletes and active individuals an unparalleled combination of situational awareness, comfort and superior audio quality. Design & Comfort Featuring an open-ear design, the Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 ensures users remain connected to their surroundings, enhancing safety during outdoor activities. The flexible neckband, constructed from premium nickel-titanium alloy, provides a secure and comfortable fit, accommodating various head sizes and shapes. Weighing approximately 30.3 grams, these headphones are lightweight, minimizing fatigue during extended use. Audio Performance At the core of the Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 is Shokz’s innovative DualPitch Technology, which combines bone conduction for precise mids and highs with air conduction speakers dedicated to delivering powerful bass. This dual-driver system results in a dynamic and clear audio experience, addressing previous limitations in bass reproduction commonly associated with bone conduction headphones. Battery Life The device offers up to 12 hours of continuous playback, catering to long training sessions or daily commutes. A quick charge feature provides approximately 2.5 hours of use from just a 5-minute charge, ensuring minimal downtime. A full charge is achieved in about 1 hour, facilitated by the convenient USB-C charging port. Connectivity Equipped with Bluetooth 5.3, the OpenRun Pro 2 ensures stable and efficient wireless connections. Notably, it supports multipoint pairing, allowing users to connect to two devices simultaneously, enhancing versatility across different devices. Durability With an IP55 rating, these headphones are resistant to sweat and water, making them suitable for various weather conditions and intense workouts. This durability ensures longevity and reliability for active users. User Interface The OpenRun Pro 2 maintains physical control buttons, offering intuitive operation for volume adjustments, track changes and call management. This tactile interface is particularly beneficial during physical activities, where quick and precise control is essential. Microphone Quality Integrated wind-resistant microphones ensure clear call quality, even in challenging environmental conditions. This feature is crucial for users who need to stay connected while on the move. Charging Port Transitioning from a proprietary charging system, the OpenRun Pro 2 now features a USB-C port, aligning with modern charging standards and providing faster, more convenient charging options.

Description: JBL PartyLight Stick Dazzle your crowd with the JBL PartyLight Stick. This colorful, energetic party light instantly syncs with any JBL Auracast™-enabled PartyBox speaker to elevate your indoor or outdoor party space with a pulsing, colorful 360-degree LED light. Name: JBL PartyBox Encore 2 + Mic
Description: JBL PartyBox Encore 2 Power up the JBL PartyBox Encore 2 and let the good times roll. With this portable speaker, you’ll want to play DJ at every event, with smooth JBL Pro Sound, a light show to fit the mood, and a mic for your emceeing pleasure. Feel that extra oomph in your chest from the epic highs and deep lows, whether your playing a new pop ballad or going with a classic slow jam. Once you’ve nailed the soundcheck, it’s time to turn up the ambiance with a light show that grooves to your beats. Ready to run the show? Grab the digital wireless mic and become your own emcee or karaoke host! You can also customize your sound with adjustable echo, bass, and treble controls to make sure you sound just right. From open rooftops to crowded basements, the JBL PartyBox Encore 2 knows how to adapt, with its grab-and-go handle and IPX4 splash-proof design. What’s better than one JBL PartyBox Encore 2? Two! Pair them up for true stereo vibes or link with other JBL Auracast™-enabled speakers for an even wilder dance party. And if 15 hours of nonstop jams isn’t enough, grab a spare rechargeable battery to keep the music going. Make the vibes immaculate with the JBL PartyBox app, where you can control your playlist, add fun sound effects, and pick the perfect light show mood—all while you’re doing the worm on the dance floor. Whatever the occasion, the JBL PartyBox Encore 2 knows how to bring all the feels.

Name: JBL PartyBox 520
Description: JBL PartyBox 520 Got big plans that call for big sound? The JBL PartyBox 520 knows how to set the mood with a vibey lightshow and our biggest, boldest, thumping sound yet, powered by the all new AI Sound Boost tech to help get everyone moving and shaking. Our sound might be heavy but this speaker is easy to move, whether we’re setting up in the backyard, by the pool, or that place where our friend just dropped a pin. Every move is smooth with the PartyBox 520’s grippy handle and wide wheels that are ready to roll when you are. With up to 15 hours of playtime, you can host multiple parties before it’s time for a recharge. And don’t worry about any splashes or spills, this speaker is designed to withstand the most raucous parties - fouls and all. What’s better than one JBL PartyBox 520? Two or three or more! Pair them up or link with other JBL Auracast™-enabled speakers and take the party up a notch.

Name: JBL Clip 5
Description: JBL Clip 5 The JBL Clip 5 ultra-portable Bluetooth speaker is small enough to hold in one hand, but don’t let the size fool you—it’s big where it counts. A wide, fully integrated carabiner is big enough to clip to just about anything. The powerful driver and passive radiator deliver bigger, louder JBL Pro Sound and punchy bass. A single charge gives you up to 12 hours of playtime—and even more if Playtime Boost is turned on. Speaking of outside, it’s IP67-certified waterproof and dustproof, so it’s a natural to take on your next hike or camping trip. Pair two Clip 5′ s together for stereo sound, or instantly connect it with multiple JBL Auracast-enabled speakers for even bigger sound over more space. Plus it’s available in a variety of colors, so you’re sure to find one that fits your vibe. Every day is an adventure with the JBL Clip 5.

With an advanced suite of applications, customizable watch faces, and compatibility with a range of devices, it caters to both tech enthusiasts and casual users alike. In this guide, we will explore the various aspects of the The Galaxy Watch 8 presents a sophisticated blend of cutting-edge technology and elegant design, making it a standout choice in the realm of smartwatches. Throughout this comprehensive review, we delve into the intricacies of the Galaxy Watch 8, from its sleek aesthetics to its robust health tracking capabilities, offering a detailed insight into its superiority over previous models. , including its design, functionality, health tracking capabilities, battery life, and how it compares to its predecessors. The Galaxy Watch 8 is a powerful smartwatch that combines style, functionality, and advanced health tracking features. Whether you’re an athlete looking to enhance your training or a casual user wanting to stay connected, the Galaxy Watch 8 is designed to meet your needs. With its extensive capabilities and user-friendly interface, it is poised to become a top choice for anyone in the market for a smartwatch. The improved health monitoring capabilities, along with additional fitness tracking modes, make it a worthy upgrade for existing Galaxy Watch users. Additionally, the integration of newer technologies ensures that the watch remains competitive in the rapidly evolving smartwatch market. Battery Life With all these features, the battery life of the Galaxy Watch 8 is another highlight. Users can expect up to several days of usage on a single charge, depending on their usage patterns. Users can monitor their heart rate, track sleep patterns, and even receive alerts for irregular heart rhythms. The watch also includes advanced fitness tracking modes for various activities such as running, cycling, and swimming. Name: JBL SoundBar 1000MK2
Description: JBL SoundBar 1000MK2 Real spatial sound—the kind that fills your space from floor to ceiling with true Dolby Atmos® and DTS:X height effects—can be yours in seconds. Just pick up the detachable wireless speakers from either end of the JBL SoundBar 1000MK2 soundbar and place them behind where you’re sitting. That’s it. While you’re pulled into the center of the action, you’ll enjoy deep, punchy bass from a 10″ subwoofer and MultiBeam™ 3.0 for the widest, most cinematic soundstage. If you need to step out of the room while you’re catching up with your favorite video podcast or enjoying your go-to streaming playlist on your TV, take one of the wireless speakers along and you won’t have to miss a thing. JBL can do this because our speakers are trusted in cinemas, recording studios, and concert halls. And this immersive sound experience works seamlessly with all TV brands. Enjoy the freedom of unbound cinematic sound. JBL SoundBar 1000MK2 Features Real panoramic surround sound with detachable wireless speakers Elevate your 3D surround sound experience with dynamic, immersive height. Four up-firing speakers in the soundbar and wireless rear speakers deliver true Dolby Atmos® sound. No extra wires. No power connections. Just lift the detachable surround speakers off the soundbar—you can do it with just one hand—and place them behind where you want to sit, instantly transforming them into a true surround sound setup. It’s that simple. Whether you’re binge-watching your new favorite show or hosting a movie night, the speakers’ rechargeable long-lasting batteries mean you’ll enjoy immersive, cinematic surround sound for hours. When you’re done, simply place them back on the soundbar to charge overnight. 960W max output power and a 10″ wireless subwoofer Transform the way you watch, listen, and game. Experience new cinematic heights of sound. 480 watts of maximum output makes your spatial audio experience feel that much more powerful. Action movies get even more exciting with big, thundering bass from the 10″ wireless subwoofer. True Dolby Atmos® and DTS:X Plunge into theater-quality 3D spatial sound with true Dolby Atmos® and DTS:X. Shiver as spaceships fill the sky overhead. Feel explosions that rumble through your body. Experience music like you’re right there in the recording studio. Now available at Avi Communications.

Just pick up the two detachable wireless speakers from either end of the JBL SoundBar 800MK2—you can do it with one hand—and place them behind you for thrilling surround sound with 3D Dolby Atmos® spatial effects, punchy bass from a 10″ subwoofer, and MultiBeam™ 3.0 for a wider, cinematic soundstage. And if you need to step out of the room while you’re catching up with your favorite video podcast or enjoying your go-to streaming playlist on your TV, just take one of the wireless speakers along and you won’t miss a thing. Your TV can’t deliver sound even close to this level. JBL has a century of experience creating top-quality speakers for cinemas, recording studios, and concert venues. And now we bring that level of craft to your living room, with a cinematic sound experience that works seamlessly with all TVs. Give yourself the freedom to experience uncompromising sound. JBL SoundBar 800MK2 Features Real surround sound with detachable wireless speakers It’s never been easier to jump into true surround sound. No extra wires. No power connections. Just lift the detachable surround speakers off the soundbar—you can do it with just one hand—and place them behind you in the room for true surround sound. It’s that simple. Whether you’re binge-watching your new favorite show or hosting a movie night, the speakers’ long-lasting batteries mean you’ll enjoy immersive, cinematic surround sound for hours. When you’re done, simply place them back on the soundbar to charge overnight. 780W max output power and a 10″ wireless subwoofer Feel like you’re part of the action as a climactic battle scene unfolds. Surrender to the beat of your favorite song. Your movies, music, and games become an even more vivid and immersive sound experience with 780 watts of total system power, including big, thundering bass from the 10″" wireless subwoofer. Dolby Atmos® Hear a plane soar overhead. Feel a crowd swarming past you. Or get carried away by the energy of your go-to dance playlist. Hear extraordinary cinematic sound from all directions with the 3D audio experience of Dolby Atmos®. Owners Manual (English)

Name: JBL SoundBar 500MK2
Description: JBL SoundBar 500MK2 Go deeper into movies—with bigger bass. JBL has been synonymous with great movie sound since talkies were first invented. And now we can be in your living room, delivering that same immersive cinematic sound with the JBL SoundBar 500MK2. Flat TVs give you flat sound. So leave the screen to the TV experts and trust your ears to us: the audio experts. Enjoy crystal-clear dialogue, Dolby Atmos® surround effects, and a wide soundstage that elevates your entertainment experience. Plus an extra jolt of deep, punchy bass thanks to a wireless 10” subwoofer that adds more excitement to your games and more groove to your favorite music from hundreds of streaming services. And it works seamlessly with every brand of TV. Level up your sound game. JBL SoundBar 500MK2 Features 750W max output power and a 10” wireless subwoofer Feel every on-screen crash, bang, and boom right in your chest. Your movies, music, and games become an even more immersive, theater-like sound experience with 750 watts of total system power, including big, thundering bass from the 10” wireless subwoofer. Dolby Atmos® Hear a plane soar overhead. Feel a crowd swarming past you. Or get carried away by the energy of your go-to dance playlist. Hear extraordinary cinematic sound from all directions with the 3D audio experience of Dolby Atmos®. MultiBeam™ 3.0 - Wherever you’re sitting, you’ll be in the middle of the action. Our MultiBeam™ 3.0 delivers a wide, cinemalike soundstage that makes every high-speed chase or epic fight scene come alive. The sound beams perfectly fill your room, delivering truly immersive, lifelike, and realistic sound reproduction. PureVoice 2.0 Never miss a softly spoken line or a whispered plot twist. JBL’s own PureVoice 2.0 automatically raises or optimizes the dialogue, based on both ambient sound in the scene and your soundbar’s volume. So you’ll always hear every word, clearly and consistently, in cinema-quality sound. SmartDetails - Hear all the subtleties in a film’s sound mix, just like you would in the theater. From a creaking door to a faraway shout, experience every detail the way the filmmakers intended in a clear, balanced sound field, thanks to JBL’s own advanced sound enhancement technology. Easy Sound Calibration - Every room is different. JBL SoundBar 500MK2 discovers how sound reflects off your walls and furniture. So it’ll deliver the best 3D surround effects, tuned specifically for your space and with any TV. JBL One App Set up the soundbar using the JBL ONE app, then make it yours. Customize the sound your way with a precise equalizer, browse your favorite music apps, and get software upgrades for all the latest features, right from your couch. HDMI eARC with 4K Dolby Vision passthrough No matter what brand your TV is, enjoy uncompressed Dolby Atmos surround sound through a single HDMI cable thanks to the HDMI eARC connection. The HDMI input connection also offers 4K video quality from a compatible video player or gaming console. Here at Avi Communications, we have a variety of soundbars.

Name: JBL Partybox Wireless Mic
Description: JBL Partybox Wireless Mic Set Make your good times even better with JBL PartyBox Wireless Mics Set. Just plug them into any JBL PartyBox, or use the dongle for the freedom of a wireless connection, and let your voice be heard. Indoors or outside, you’ll sound clear and captivating on these mics specially tailored to sound amazing over any PartyBox speaker. A built-in foam pop filter minimizes any extraneous vocal sounds as you sing a duet with your best friend, and a shock mount system keeps things quiet when you’re passing the mic to someone else. Up to 20 hours of play time and because you can still use a mic even while it’s charging on the PartyBox’s built-in power bank, the fun will last as long as the party does. Rock the house with the PartyBox Wireless Mic. Partybox Wireless Mic Features Clear voice, crisp sound Minimize all unwanted noise Easy to use Compatible with all PartyBox speakers Sing out all night long Rechargeable battery Stable 2.4GHz connection Packaged in FSC-certified paper printed with soy ink

Name: Sony WH-1000XM6 - Black
Description: Sony WH-1000XM6 Discover the Sony WH-1000XM6, the premium wireless headphones feature the advanced HD Noise Canceling Processor QN3, delivering real-time adaptive noise cancellation that’s 7x faster than the previous model. Co-developed with top mastering audio engineers, the Sony WH-1000XM6 offers crystal-clear high-resolution sound and rich, balanced audio. Enjoy ultra-clear calls, up to 30 hours of battery life, a compact foldable design, and intelligent features like Adaptive NC Optimizer and Auto Ambient Sound Mode. For music lovers, travelers, and professionals, the WH-1000XM6 sets a new standard in wireless headphone performance. See also Sony ULT WEAR. Unparalleled Noise Cancellation, Reinvented Step into a world of immersive silence with the Sony WH-1000XM6. Powered by the cutting-edge HD Noise Canceling Processor QN3, which is 7x faster than the QN1 processor used in the previous WH-1000XM5, the Sony WH-1000XM6 brings you superior noise suppression. With 12 advanced microphones working in real time, it adapts to your surroundings to eliminate distractions and let you focus on what matters—your music. Sound Precision Co-Created by Audio Masters Developed in collaboration with world-renowned mastering audio engineers, the Sony WH-1000XM6 delivers studio-quality audio. A specially crafted driver with a lightweight carbon fiber dome ensures your music remains rich, clear, and authentic. From punchy basslines to crisp vocals and balanced instrumentals, the XM6 is tuned to deliver sound exactly as the artist intended. Advanced Calling Features for the Modern Lifestyle Communicate clearly, no matter where you are. The Sony WH-1000XM6 features a six-microphone beamforming system with AI-based noise reduction and wind-resistance technology. Whether you’re on a call in a crowded street or a breezy outdoor setting, your voice comes through ultra-clear without interference from background noise. Thoughtful, Travel-Friendly Design Take your music wherever you go. The Sony WH-1000XM6 offers a foldable design and comes in a compact magnetic carrying case, making it perfect for travel. The wider, cushioned headband and smooth synthetic leather ear pads offer a luxurious, pressure-free fit for all-day wear. A stepless slider and seamless swivel provide precision and flexibility with every adjustment. Intelligent Listening with Adaptive Optimization The Adaptive NC Optimizer automatically fine-tunes noise cancellation based on your environment, air pressure, and even whether you’re wearing glasses or a hat. Complemented by Auto Ambient Sound Mode, it lets in important sounds like announcements or conversations when needed—perfect for busy urban life or airport terminals. Superior Battery Life with Fast Charging Stay powered for the long haul. The Sony WH-1000XM6 offers up to 30 hours of battery life, and when you’re in a hurry, a 3-minute charge delivers up to 3 hours of playback with a compatible USB-PD adapter. Whether you’re commuting, flying, or working, you’re always connected. High-Resolution Audio, Wired or Wireless Enjoy studio-quality sound on the go. Supporting Hi-Res Audio and Hi-Res Audio Wireless via LDAC, Sony’s industry-leading codec, the WH-1000XM6 transmits 3x more data than conventional Bluetooth audio, preserving every detail in your favorite tracks.

Name: Canon EOS R50 V Mirrorless Camera + RF-S 14-30mm F4-6.3 IS STM PZ Lens
Description: Canon EOS R50 V Mirrorless Camera + RF-S 14-30mm F4-6.3 IS STM PZ Lens Built for creators, the Canon EOS R50 V is an interchangeable lens video camera with powerful filmmaking features like 4K 60p recording¹, Canon Log 3, and custom colour profiles. The vari-angle touchscreen and front-facing record button make solo shooting effortless, while intelligent autofocus keeps subjects sharp. Custom picture styles let you refine your aesthetic, and advanced audio controls ensure clear, high-quality sound. The Canon EOS R50 V is an ideal video camera for content creation, whether you’re livestreaming, creating cinematic shorts, or producing scroll-stopping social content. It offers creative control and versatility to elevate your storytelling. Unleash your creativity The Canon EOS R50 V is an interchangeable lens video camera designed to elevate your creative storytelling. Find the perfect lens for your vision, whether that’s to capture sweeping landscapes or detailed close-ups, and create standout content with a 4K compact video camera, oversampled from 6K for enhanced clarity and detail. Cinematic control at your fingertips Add intrigue to your videos with slow and fast motion modes, and achieve cinematic slow motion with Full HD 120p, while 4:2:2 10-bit recording ensures richer colour depth and flexibility for colour grading. Refine your aesthetic with custom picture styles and colour filters. Take it further by shooting in Canon Log 3, giving you more flexibility to fine-tune colours in post-production. Designed for vlogging Use the vari-angle touchscreen to adjust your settings, and the front-facing record button to start filming. Plus, you can rely on subject detection autofocus to stay sharp on screen. The Canon EOS R50 V is built to be a social media camera, with a dedicated tripod mount for easy vertical shooting, and Movie IS to reduce camera shake. Streamline your workflow The Canon EOS R50 V is a content creator’s camera, built for efficiency. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and USB connectivity enable instant transfers to your smartphone or computer for fast edits and uploads. The LIVE button gives you quick access to your streaming options, so you can go live in seconds without a complex setup. Seamless shooting and charging Never worry about battery life interrupting your creative flow. The Canon EOS R50 V auto-transfers your files while charging, so you can back up your footage even while the camera is off. Your content, your way Create professional-looking videos with manual exposure and focus controls, giving you full creative control over the look of your footage. Fine-tune your sound while recording, grab high-res frames for your YouTube thumbnails, and simultaneously frame for multiple platforms with aspect markers. Smooth and steady Pair the EOS R50 V with the RF-S 14-30mm F4-6.3 IS STM PZ Lens featuring Optical Image Stabilisation² for shake-free footage, even when shooting handheld. This ultra-wide lens features an internal power zoom for smooth transitions and remote zoom capabilities for greater creative control.

Name: Amazfit Active 2 (Round) - Premium Edition
Description: Amazfit Active 2 The Active 2 smartwatch is designed for fashion-conscious, health-focused people who value style and functionality. It features a bright 1.32″ display in a sleek 44mm stainless steel case, offering easy to read clarity in bright sunlight. With BioTracker technology for precise heart rate and sleep tracking, 160+ workout modes including HYROX race, and up to 10 days of battery life. Enjoy free offline maps with GPS turn-by-turn directions, Zepp Flow AI voice control, and detailed health insights via the free Zepp App. Upgrade your fitness game with the Amazfit smartwatch, designed to support your active lifestyle. The Amazfit smartwatch is perfect for those who want both style and top-notch health tracking features. The Amazfit smartwatch is designed for those who want both style and top-notch health tracking features. With this watch, you can easily monitor your health metrics and stay on top of your fitness goals. Up to 10 days battery life during typical use Precise heart rate and sleep data with BioTracker technology Large 1.32″ display, 1.73″ (44mm) case, 2,000 nits brightness 160+ workout modes including strength training, and HYROX race Free Zepp app with health and fitness tracking insights Timeless Design Black Leather - Premium Version - The premium version features a screen protected by sapphire glass, a material so durable that only diamonds can scratch it. The premium version includes a free red silicone sport band, letting you effortlessly transition between a sporty and elegant look. The Amazfit Active 2’s elegant design makes it suitable for any occasion, from workouts to formal events. Silicone Sport Straps - Lightweight, soft, and skin-friendly, these silicone straps are designed for breathability and resist moisture retention. Perfect for those intense, sweaty workouts. Stay Active for Longer - Frustrated with digging out your charger every night? Tired of your fitness tracker dying mid-workout? The Amazfit Active 2 lasts beat for beat with you. Stay powered-up, stay active. Experience unmatched versatility with the Amazfit smartwatch, your companion for every adventure. Typical Usage²: up to 10 Days Heavy Usage: up to 5 Days Continuous GPS Usage: Up to 21 Hours 24 / 7 Health and Fitness Monitoring - Amazfit’s BioTracker™ technology provides precise, real-time monitoring of heart rate variability, sleep quality, and more. Working alongside our new PulsePrecision™ heart rate algorithm, you can power through your favorite workouts with confidence that reflects the work you put in backed by trusted data. Stay in tune with your health metrics using the Amazfit Active 2’s advanced monitoring features. Fitness and Maps Strength Training - Plan your gym routine in the Zepp App, sync your exercise list to the watch, and then engage Strength Training mode. Once you start, the watch can auto-detect 25 exercise types and will intelligently count your reps, sets, and rest time. When you’re done, you’ll find analysis of your performance in the Zepp App. The Amazfit smartwatch empowers you to push your limits, tracking your progress every step of the way. HYROX Race Mode - HYROX combines running and functional workouts, with professional athletes and everyday fitness enthusiasts taking part in races. Get a leg up on your HYROX competition with Amazfit’s exclusive and official HYROX Race mode. Choose from Single, Double, or Team Relay workouts, then time and track your performance. Participate in HYROX events with confidence, equipped with the performance-tracking capabilities of the Amazfit smartwatch. 160+ Workout Modes - Track GPS activities like running, cycling, yoga, padel, and even dog walking. Monitor data like heart rate, steps, calories burned, distance, pace, and much more. The watch is water-resistant and features a barometer, so sports like swimming and skiing are fully trackable With the Amazfit smartwatch, you’re not just tracking workouts; you’re achieving your fitness goals. With the Amazfit smartwatch, you’re not just tracking workouts; you’re achieving your fitness goals with confidence and style. Zepp Coach™ - Train smarter with personalized AI-generated workout plans that intelligently adjust based on your performance and recovery. Choose from regular training plans that can be applied to most workout modes, or get specialist running plans for 3k, 5k, or 10k races, and half or full marathons. The Amazfit smartwatch’s AI features adapt to your training style, ensuring optimal performance. Your Routes, Your Way - Download a map and route from the Zepp App, and get turn-by-turn directions as you move. If you need to keep your eyes focused on your path, the watch can read your directions aloud via the speaker or your connected Bluetooth headphones. Take advantage of ski season with maps for a huge range of resorts worldwide, and get precise guidance for cable cars, color-coded slopes, and a lot more. With the support of five satellite positioning systems, you’ll acquire connection quickly, for accurate positioning that keeps your navigation on-track. Navigate your routes effortlessly with the Amazfit Active 2, making every journey enjoyable. Note: Check out the full list of supported ski resorts here. Stay Active, Stay Healthy Remember to wear your Amazfit Active 2 to track your activity levels throughout the day. RestoreIQ™ - Our new sleep tracking algorithm monitors your sleep with higher accuracy than the previous generation. Stay on top of your recovery with in-depth tracking of sleep quality, breathing, and stages, and even naps. With the Amazfit smartwatch, you can maintain a comprehensive overview of your health and fitness. Monitoring & Alerts - Monitor your heart rate, stress, blood-oxygen, and breathing rate on a 24/7 basis, and get smart alerts for abnormal readings. One-Tap Measuring - Test your heart rate, stress level, blood-oxygen, and breathing rate simultaneously for a quick overview of all four metrics in only 45 seconds. Utilize the Amazfit smartwatch for quick health assessments, enhancing your wellness routine. Total Voice Control - Zepp Flow™ gives you full control of your watch using just your voice. Easily adjust settings, check Zepp Coach™ progress, view your readiness score, and more—no tapping, swiping, or memorizing keywords required. Manage your daily tasks more efficiently with the Amazfit Active 2’s voice control features. Message Replies - Through Zepp Flow™, you can type Android message replies using a full QWERTY keyboard or dictate your reply for speech-to-text input. Zepp Flow™ intelligently optimizes your reply with suggestions or translations, and sends it seamlessly. Stay connected seamlessly with the Amazfit smartwatch, ensuring you never miss important messages. New Notification Center - Catch your messages, news headlines, and sports updates, all in one place. Scroll through them with ease, or have Zepp Flow™ read them aloud to you. Cycle Tracking - Get predictions and reminders for upcoming fertile and menstrual periods with the built-in Cycle Tracking feature. Plan ahead, stay active. Wild.AI - Turn your hormones into your superpower, with exercise, diet, and recovery recommendations from Wild.AI based on your menstrual and hormonal cycles. Connect to your Wild.AI account from your wrist, using Amazfit’s exclusive mini app. Amazfit smartwatch users can benefit from personalized health insights tailored to their needs. Answer incoming calls or dial outgoing calls, control your phone’s camera* and music, sync notifications, and much more - all via Bluetooth connection to your phone. *Phone camera control is only supported for iOS devices. Upload your own photo as a custom watch face background, or head to the Zepp App and choose from over 400 free downloadable watch faces. Customize your display with different looks and data layouts anytime. Connect to the Zepp App With no hidden subscription fees, the Zepp App powers all Amazfit devices. Here’s a glimpse of what the Zepp App has to offer: Industry-leading data protection through Amazon Web Services (AWS) and GDPR compliance. Optional disabling of GPS location data permissions, data backups, and more. Health, training, and recovery data analysis and guidance. Free software updates for your watch. Compatibility with iOS and Android phones. Zepp Aura sleep coach with customized sleep music and sleep health reports. Watch face and mini app stores, rich with options to customize your experience. Eco-Friendly Packaging - Join the Amazfit Active 2 community to explore sustainable technology that supports your lifestyle. At Amazfit, we try to do our part to give you the tech you need to achieve your goals, while making sure it’s done in a sustainable way. That’s why your Amazfit Active 2 will come packaged in 100% recyclable materials, with a charging base (USB Type-C compatible) in the box - but no cable, to reduce waste on our side and extra cords at home on your side. Get started on your journey with the Amazfit Active 2, the smartwatch that adapts to your life. Amazfit products available at Avi Communications.

Name: Xiaomi Watch 2
Description: Xiaomi Watch 2 Smarter living. A new experience. Powered with Wear OS by Google - Wear OS by Google allows you to stay up-to-date while staying in the moment. Get your favorite Google apps on your Xiaomi Watch 2. Navigate with Google Maps, pay on the go with Google Pay, get answers with Google Assistant, and more. A world of content - Google Play allows you to access apps and watch faces anytime, anywhere — all from your Xiaomi watch. Speed through checkout - Google Pay is the fast, simple way to pay in stores with your watch. Add your card to Google Wallet and pay with a twist of your wrist. Never miss a turn - Enjoy turn-by-turn directions for driving, walking, and cycling directly on your wrist thanks to Google Maps on your watch. A little help on the go - Xiaomi Watch 2 with Google Assistant helps you make the most of your time. Just press and hold the power button to manage daily tasks, plan your day, or get answers. Smart platform Flagship performance 4nm flagship processor, Better performance with lower power consumption - The dual architecture of large and small cores provides high performance and low power consumption autonomous switching, which brings long battery life, large storage, and a smoother flagship experience. 2G + 32G. Extra-large storage - With LPDDR4X and eMMC memory, Xiaomi Watch 2 offers impressive storage performance and space comparable to a smartphone. Download as many watch faces and third-party apps as you like, not to mention all your favorite songs to give your workouts a boost. Up to 65-hour battery life. Magnetic charging - With its 495mAh high-capacity battery and Qualcomm’s hybrid architecture, Xiaomi Watch 2 gives you power that lasts. Smart monitoring. A healthier life 160+ sports modes - Supports more than 160 sports modes with an optimized professional algorithm model that provides you with more accurate workout data, so your workouts can be more scientific and productive. Professional skiing mode. Clear display of your performance data and location tracking - With the new professional skiing mode, you can capture and record the distance and average speed for each glide. See more on the results page, and even harvest your "Ski Track Map". 5-system L1+L5 GNSS. Improved positioning accuracy - Integrated with Google Maps, Xiaomi Watch 2 excels in navigating complex environments like high-rise buildings and jungles, providing clear movement distance, pace, and route information. 5ATM water resistance* - Don’t be afraid to get wet. Wear it during runs in the rain or while swimming for more accurate exercise data. Newly upgraded. 12-channel PPG monitoring - Xiaomi Watch 2 features12-channel PPG monitoring to keep track of your heart rate, blood oxygen saturation, and stress levels faster and with more precision. It also offers stronger anti-interference capabilities to identify your sleep patterns with improved accuracy. All-day health protection Heart rate monitoring throughout the day* - Multiple heart rate monitoring modes and alerts for an abnormal heart rate help protect your heart health. All-day blood oxygen saturation monitoring - Send vibration alerts* when your blood oxygen saturation is too low. Scientific sleep monitoring - Record your sleep cycle for targeted advice on improving your sleep. Female health management - Tracks menstruation records on your phone and predicts your menstrual cycle. All-day stress monitoring - More in-depth all-day pressure monitoring and more detailed status display. Breathing exercises - Feeling stressed? Follow a guided breathing session to relax and refocus*. What’s your sleep animal? - Sleep with the watch on your wrist for seven consecutive nights for even more accurate sleep analysis using Mi Fitness app. Based on your sleeping habits, you will be matched with a ‘sleep animal’ to help you visualize your sleeping style. Stay safe with emergency assistance Call for help in an emergency - In the event of sudden physical discomfort, threats to personal safety, or other unpredictable situations, press the lower button 3 times in a row to instantly dial an emergency contact. Call for help following an accidental fall* - In the event of an accidental fall, Xiaomi Watch 2 can automatically call your emergency contacts and sends your location via SMS. Health data at your fingertips With Xiaomi’s independently developed algorithm and Mi Fitness app, Xiaomi Watch 2 can monitor your health with greater accuracy. It also supports a wide range of workout apps favored by users around the world, including Strava and Suunto. Smart design. A new style 1.43″ AMOLED Display. Light up a smarter outlook - The large AMOLED Retina Display delivers crystal-clear viewing for more details at a glance. Lightweight aluminum alloy body. Streamlined design - Xiaomi Watch 2 boasts a lightweight aluminum alloy body available in two stylish color options, for a modern, high-tech aesthetic. The classic layout, featuring buttons on both sides, seamlessly complements straps and watch faces of various styles, making it suitable for any occasion. Smart connections Redefined convenience Interactive sensory course Unleash your inner boxer - Open the Mi Fitness app for built-in combat and boxing training. Have fun while mastering jabs, hooks, footwork and dodging. Put on the Xiaomi Watch 2 and train anytime, anywhere. TV remote on your wrist Easy and intuitive - The Xiaomi Watch 2, with the help of the Xiaomi TV remote app, transforms into a portable remote control, enabling effortless channel changes and volume adjustments for your Xiaomi Smart TV*. Camera remote Preview on your wrist - Supports remote photo-taking, video-shooting and previews*. There’s no need to ask others for help—you can even take time-lapses with timer for 3s and 5s. Answer calls from your wrist. Always stay connected - Synchronize your phone’s notifications via Bluetooth®. Easily answer calls on your watch using the built-in microphone and speaker. Name: JBL Tune Beam 2 - Black
Description: JBL Tune Beam 2 Take on your day one song at a time with JBL Tune Beam 2 true wireless earbuds featuring Adaptive Noise Cancelling. They deliver up to 48 hours of exceptional JBL Pure Bass Sound and JBL Spatial Sound, while the ergonomic (and water and dust resistant) design gives you all-day comfort in any weather. Enjoy perfect-sounding calls without ambient noise, all managed using intuitive touch controls. With Adaptive Noise Cancelling and Smart Ambient technology, you can tune out the world, or choose how much you engage with your surroundings. You can even personalize your sound experience with the JBL Headphones app and tailor audio around you with Personi-Fi 3.0. Pop in the JBL Tune Beam 2 and experience your world your way. JBl Tune Beam 2 now available at Avi Communications. JBL Tune Beam 2 Features JBL Pure Bass Sound with Spatial Sound JBL Tune Beam 2 earbuds feature 10mm dynamic drivers that deliver powerful JBL Pure Bass sound. And whether you’re listening to your favorite playlist, watching a movie, or playing a game, JBL Spatial Sound transforms the stereo sound from any source or device into a more immersive sound experience. Adaptive noise cancelling with Smart Ambient JBL Tune Beam 2 earbuds use Adaptive Noise Cancelling to tune out noises entirely or just let in as much of the outside world you want. Name: Apple AirPods 4 ANC
Description: Apple AirPods 4 ANC The new Earbuds Apple AirPods 4 ANC have a new design similar to the AirPods Pro, and also supports spatial audio with dynamic head tracking, longer battery life, and also comes with Adaptive EQ powered by computational audio. There are new force sensor controls for easy and intuitive control of music and phone calls, and it also supports wireless charging. Buy Airpods 4 ANC at Avi Communications. Design & Comfort The design of the AirPods 4 takes cues from its predecessors, but with some subtle changes that make a world of difference. Apple has tweaked the earbud’s shape for an even more comfortable and secure fit, ideal for long listening sessions or workouts. They have the same sleek, minimalist aesthetic that has become iconic with Apple’s audio products, and you will immediately notice their premium build quality. The AirPods 4 feel solid in hand, and their case is compact enough to fit into any pocket or bag effortlessly. Apple has paid extra attention to ergonomics with this generation. The earbuds now come with four different sizes of ear tips, allowing users to find the perfect fit for their ear shape. This not only enhances comfort but also improves the effectiveness of the ANC and the quality of bass response, as a snug fit seals out ambient noise more effectively. In addition, the earbuds are lightweight and do not put pressure on the ear, making them suitable for prolonged usage without causing discomfort. Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) and Transparency Mode One of the most significant upgrades in the AirPods 4 is the Active Noise Cancellation. Apple has re-engineered the ANC technology, making it one of the most effective implementations available in any wireless earbuds. The ANC feature allows users to immerse themselves fully in their music, podcasts, or calls by eliminating background noise more effectively than previous AirPods models. Whether you are commuting on a noisy train, working in a bustling café, or relaxing at home, the AirPods 4 with ANC can significantly reduce distracting environmental sounds, creating a more focused listening experience. Apple has also improved the Transparency Mode, which has become a fan-favorite feature for users who need to stay aware of their surroundings. This feature is especially helpful when walking around the city or at the office, allowing ambient sounds to come through in a natural and clear way without needing to remove the earbuds. With a simple touch of the stem, you can switch seamlessly between ANC and Transparency Mode, making it easy to adapt to different environments. Apple has managed to make the transitions between these modes incredibly smooth, adding to the overall user experience. AirPods 4 ANC Audio Quality and Sound Performance Apple has elevated the audio quality on the AirPods 4, which brings a noticeable improvement over previous generations. The sound signature is balanced and warm, providing a rich listening experience that appeals to both casual listeners and audiophiles. Apple has worked to achieve a dynamic sound range that does not overemphasize bass, ensuring clarity in mids and highs. This balanced audio profile is versatile, whether you are listening to bass-heavy music, podcasts with spoken word, or classical compositions. The AirPods 4 also feature Adaptive EQ, which automatically adjusts the sound based on the shape of your ear and the content you’re listening to. This is a highly intuitive feature that optimizes the listening experience on the fly. Coupled with the enhanced ANC, the Adaptive EQ provides an immersive listening experience, with sound clarity that rivals many over-ear headphones. Apple’s new custom drivers deliver deeper bass and crisper highs than before, which is particularly noticeable when playing high-fidelity audio files. The spatial audio support with dynamic head tracking is a game-changer for those who enjoy cinematic soundscapes. When watching movies or using compatible apps, the spatial audio feature creates a three-dimensional sound field that moves with your head, enhancing immersion and realism. Apple’s precision tuning of these drivers ensures that every instrument and vocal nuance stands out, resulting in audio that is both immersive and true to life. Seamless Apple Ecosystem Integration One of the key strengths of the AirPods 4 is how effortlessly they integrate with the Apple ecosystem. Thanks to the updated H2 chip, pairing the AirPods 4 with any Apple device is a breeze. The H2 chip also enables fast and seamless switching between Apple devices, such as the iPhone, iPad, MacBook, or Apple Watch. If you are in the middle of a call on your iPhone and want to switch to watching a movie on your iPad, the transition is smooth and instant. For those who use Siri regularly, the hands-free “Hey Siri” activation is as responsive as ever, allowing you to make calls, control your music, and check the weather without reaching for your phone. Additionally, if you are an Apple Music subscriber, you can benefit from the seamless playback and optimized audio settings specifically designed for Apple Music’s spatial audio tracks. Apple has also introduced a Find My AirPods feature, which utilizes the Find My network to help you locate your earbuds if they go missing. This feature is especially useful since it provides both proximity alerts and sound prompts, making it easier to track them down. Battery Life and Charging of AirPods 4 ANC Battery life on the AirPods 4 has seen a solid improvement, with up to 5 hours of listening time on a single charge with ANC enabled. When combined with the charging case, you get up to 30 hours of total playback time, which is more than sufficient for a full day of heavy usage. For those who are always on the move, a quick 5-minute charge can provide around an hour of listening time – perfect for those moments when you’re short on time but need a bit of juice to get through. Apple has also added support for MagSafe charging, making it easier to charge the case without fumbling with cables. The case also supports standard Qi wireless charging, giving you plenty of options to keep your AirPods 4 powered up. For those who prefer wired charging, the case still includes a Lightning port, offering flexibility depending on your preferences or available charging setups. Call Quality and Voice Isolation For calls, the AirPods 4 perform remarkably well. Apple has implemented advanced microphone arrays and beamforming technology to ensure that your voice comes through clearly, even in noisy environments. The AirPods 4 isolate your voice from ambient sounds, so the person on the other end hears you loud and clear. Whether you are taking calls on a busy street, in a crowded café, or during a workout, the microphone setup minimizes background noise effectively, enhancing call quality significantly. In addition, the AirPods 4 are equipped with improved wind noise resistance, which is beneficial for outdoor calls or during activities where wind noise can be a concern. This is particularly useful for people who are frequently on the move, as it enables more reliable and higher-quality phone calls or video calls without interference from environmental noise. Durability and Water Resistance with AirPods 4 ANC The AirPods 4 have an IPX4 rating, meaning they are sweat and water-resistant. While this does not make them fully waterproof, it does provide sufficient protection for most daily activities, including workouts, light rain, and general use. The water-resistant design allows users to enjoy their AirPods in various settings without worrying about minor splashes or sweat damage. This feature, combined with their secure fit, makes them an excellent choice for athletes or anyone who enjoys listening to music during workouts.

Name: JBL Charge 6
Description: JBL Charge 6 Like that newest season of our favorite show, the JBL Charge is back and better than ever. The Charge 6 is everything we’ve come to love with new twists, higher stakes, and a bigger punch. With sound that slaps like never before, better connectivity, sturdier build, and up to 28 hourse of playtime, the Charge 6 is a portable audio beast. How do we pack more sound in the same iconic portable speaker package? With some redesigned hardware and our brand new JBL AI Sound Boost - a clever audio processing algorithm we’ve included under the hood. The end result? The Charge 6 hits way above it’s weight class, filling our space with full, rich, immersive sound - without taking more space on our table. The Charge 6 is also one of the toughest portable speakers out there. It’s waterproof, dustproof and drop-proof so it takes a beating without missing a beat. And, true to its name, the Charge 6 still includes a built-in powerbank to charge your mobile device while you continue to jam out to your tunes. What could be better than a new JBL Charge 6 in our lives? How about two? or four? Now we can effortlessly connect with other Auracast™-enabled JBL speakers to cover more ground (and more ears) with the same playlist, whether we’re throwing the most sensational rooftop soiree or getting the crowd hyped before the ultimate pickle ball tourney. This is THE JBL Charge 6. Portable audio like we’ve never heard it before. Powerful JBL Pro Sound with AI Sound Boost How does the already great JBL Charge sound profile get even better? It helps that we have some of the best engineers in the game retooling our kit to deliver our most realistic sound reproduction yet. Surprisingly rich, powerful bass and crisp higher frequencies give the Charge 6 a whole new reason to humble brag. We also added our new proprietary tech, AI Sound Boost, which analyzes your music in realtime to deliver maximum acoustic performance with less distortion. It’s like our own little audio genie in every Charge 6. All-in-all, the JBL Charge 6 comes out swinging, with bigger booms and baps, cleaner belts and claps, and everything in between. Multi-speaker connection by Auracast™ Wouldn’t it be great to share the vibes with our tribe? Now we can. With Auracast™, we can effortlessly stereo pair two Charge 6 speakers for a wider sound stage and connect multiple Auracast™-enabled JBL speakers to cover more ground with the same playlist. JBL Charge 6 Features Up to 28 hours of playtime - Keep the mood alive for 24 hours on a single charge - and when we really need to squeeze some extra juice out of our jubilee, or another dance with our darling, we can get an extra 4 hours with JBL Playtime Boost. Waterproof, dustproof, and drop-proof - Have you ever dropped your speaker, had it roll down a dusty hill and land in a lake? No? Well, believe it or not, it happens. So, we built the JBL Charge 6 to be as life-proof as they come. On top of our legendary water-proof and dust-proof design (an industry-leading IP68*, BTW), we’ve also made sure that if you drop it from 1-meter onto your concrete floor, it’ll keep kicking. But please, don’t go throwing your speaker around just to flex on your friends. Throw parties instead. *Based on lab test conditions for submersion in up to 1.5 meters of freshwater for up to 30 minutes. Sturdy handle strap - Now we can carry our sound our way with a handy removable handle strap - for those of us who love to make it from the car to the house in one trip no matter the cost. Fast charge - No need for the low battery blues when you can give your Charge 6 a quick boost! 10 minutes on the charger gets you up to 150 minutes of playtime. Built-in powerbank - No need to put the party on pause. Our built-in powerbank lets you charge your mobile device* while jamming out to your tunes. *JBL Charge 6 powerbank doesn’t support laptop computer charging. Lossless Audio Playback - When music goes lossless it gets that much better. For the real audio aficionados, we’ve made lossless audio possible by plugging into your laptop or other audio device via our USB-C port*. But, of course, in order for it to work, you need a compatible lossless audio source**. * Feature available via JBL Portable App OTA (Over The Air) software update. ** Requires compatible lossless audio content from supported apps/ services. JBL Portable app - It’s an app. We’ve all used them, and they can come in real handy. The JBL Portable app gives you access to support, updates, and customizable audio controls - so you can get just the right sound to suit your mood at any moment. Recycled plastic and fabric, plus FSC certified paper packaging - The JBL Charge 6 incorporates post-consumer recycled plastic and fabric for the speaker grille. It’s also packaged in FSC-certified paper printed with soy ink. Buy JBL Charge 6 online at the best price in Kenya at Avi Communications.

Name: Samsung Galaxy Fit3
Description: Samsung Galaxy Fit3 Samsung Galaxy Fit3 is a fitness tracker that Samsung released to select markets. The watch has a 1.6-inch AMOLED display, a metallic case, a physical home button, and a 208mAh battery. It can track over 100 types of workouts, including swimming, as it has a 5ATM/IP68 rating. It also has a physical home button, Bluetooth 5.3 support, and 256MB of internal storage. However, it lacks GPS and NFC, so you would need your phone to be with you for some outdoor activities. You can also customize the watch face with over 100 options for your photos. The Galaxy Fit3 is available in Gray, Pink Gold, and Silver colors. Order today at Avi Communications. Slim and Light Body, suited for Motion With its sleek and lightweight design, Samsung Galaxy Fit3 comfortably fits into your workout routine. The slim aluminum body, as light as 18.5g, will not weigh you down or get in your way during workouts. Plus, 5ATM and IP68 ratings mean it is ready to face raindrops or dust. Look workout-ready and stay fit. Big display for big moves The large 1.6-inch display provides plenty of room to interact with your Galaxy Fit3. See, tap, and swipe easily to do more in less time. Over 100 Workouts Explore over 100 different exercises to track by simply double-pressing the Home button. Forgot to press Start? Do not worry. Your Samsung Galaxy Fit3 automatically recognizes and tracks popular workouts for you, including running, elliptical, rowing machine, and now even pool swimming. Track your Sleep The slim, light Galaxy Fit3 rests snugly on your wrist, silently monitoring your sleep patterns through the night. Discover details about your sleep stages, snoring, and blood oxygen. Find your Sleep score, get Sleep Coaching, and have a good night’s sleep you deserve. Daily Health and Wellness Tracking Keep track of your everyday health with Galaxy Fit3, from daily activity to blood oxygen levels. See how you are doing and make healthier choices. Daily Activity: Track daily activities — including steps, activity time, burned calories, and more. Steps: Set your daily step goals and take each step towards a healthier lifestyle. Heart Rate: Measure your heart rate and get notified when it’s too high or too low. Stress: How stressed are you? Monitor your hourly stress levels and be aware of your stress patterns for better peace of mind. Blood oxygen: Check your blood oxygen levels during your sleep or at any time during the day. Your Health & Fitness at a Glance Get a comprehensive view of your workout performance, health progress, sleep patterns, and more with the Samsung Health app on your phone. Check your accumulated health data from your Galaxy Fit3 and view it over an extended period on a larger screen. Multiple functions at your fingertips Find what you need in a snap with intuitive gestures. Swipe right for Notifications, left for Tiles, down for Quick Panel, and up for App List. Want to start fresh? Just press the Home button to quickly bounce back to your home screen. For quick workouts, you can double-press the home button to jump to the exercise list. Detects falls Your Galaxy Fit3 asks if you need help when it detects a fall using built-in sensors including a barometer. For other emergencies, you can press the Home button 5 times to notify your emergency contacts. Your pre-registered Medical info will be displayed on the lock screen when help arrives. Play, check, reply. All from your wrist Snap a photo, play tunes, check incoming calls, and reply to texts — all straight from your wrist, synced with your Galaxy smartphone. Your phone Is missing? Ask your Galaxy Fit3 to ring your phone and help you locate it. Plus, you can back up your Watchfaces, apps, and more to keep your favorite settings. 100+ Watchfaces with various features See how many calories you burned today or the current local time around the world at a glance. Choose from a collection of over 100 Watchfaces, from informative to stylish, or create your own with your favorite photo. Get started with your Samsung account To start using Galaxy Fit3, a Samsung account must be registered on your phone. Your health data on your device will be safely transferred and stored in the Samsung Cloud connected to your account, so you can fully access and manage your data. Power: 13 days on a single charge Charge up to 13 days of power on a single charge, or quickly top it up to 65% in just 30 mins. Worry less about the battery life and focus more on your everyday fitness.
